analysis.object: T548: Fractal Dimension of Turbulence depth analysis

mandelbrot_2_5.description: Mandelbrot: turbulent dissipation on fractal of dimension ~2.5
mandelbrot_2_5.reason: Fractal dimension 2.5 is between 2 (EML-3) and 3 (EML-inf); non-integer = EML-inf

fractional_depth.description: T110: fractional EML depth is impossible in integer-depth framework
fractional_depth.reason: Fractal dimension 2.5 is an EML-inf certificate: between 2D and 3D depth

non_integer_implies_emlinf.description: Non-integer dimension = categorification event; fractal is EML-inf structure
non_integer_implies_emlinf.reason: Fractal geometry is EML-inf: self-similar, non-integer, beyond finite description
